name: Morlam Summer
original_name: หมอลำซัมเมอร์
overview: Thai-American Annie travels from New York to Ubon Ratchathani for the summer. Despite being disconnected from Isan culture, she finds herself on the path to becoming a morlam singer led by handsome producer Sattaya. She has many competitors, many men fighting for her heart, and a fierce rival in Preem. Will this international girl's dream of becoming a morlam superstar this summer succeed?
